_comment: Documentation checklists per payer + CPT. required_docs is the checklist the Doc Completeness agent validates against.

required_docs: Conservative treatment: physical therapy documented for minimum 3 months
NSAIDs or intra-articular injections trialed and documented
Weight-bearing X-ray showing joint space narrowing (Kellgren-Lawrence grade 3 or 4)
BMI documented and must be below 40 kg/m2
Functional impairment scoring (KOOS or KSS questionnaire completed)
Orthopedic surgeon ordering provider NPI verified as active
Cardiology specialist ordering (taxonomy code verification required)
Non-invasive cardiac stress test result (positive within 90 days)
ECG report within 30 days
Clinical documentation of acute coronary syndrome or unstable angina
Medications trialed (nitrates, beta-blockers) documented
CT chest report documenting nodule size, location, and Fleischner Society category
Smoking history and risk factor documentation (pack-years, cessation status)
Prior surveillance CT demonstrating interval growth (if nodule >= 6mm, high-risk patient)
Pulmonology or thoracic surgery specialist ordering (NPI specialty verified)
Clinical indication: radiologist report recommending tissue sampling

70553.policy_reference: UHC Coverage Determination Guideline - Advanced Imaging
required_docs: Neurologist or neurology-trained ordering provider NPI verified
Clinical indication documented (e.g., MS monitoring, headache with red flags)
Prior imaging results if this is a follow-up study
Cardiology specialist ordering (NPI taxonomy: Cardiovascular Disease 207RC0000X)
Positive non-invasive cardiac stress test within 90 days
ECG report
Documentation of unstable angina, NSTEMI, or STEMI symptoms
Failed or inadequate medical management documented (nitrates, beta-blockers)

J0135.policy_reference: Cigna Coverage Policy 0522 - Biologic DMARDs for RA
required_docs: Rheumatoid arthritis diagnosis confirmed (RF or anti-CCP antibody positive)
DAS28 or CDAI disease activity score documented (moderate-severe: DAS28 > 3.2)
Methotrexate trial: minimum 3 months at dose >= 15mg/week, documented inadequate response or intolerance
Second DMARD trial: leflunomide or hydroxychloroquine failure documented
Rheumatologist ordering provider NPI verified (taxonomy: Rheumatology 207RR0500X)
No active infection or TB (TB screening within 12 months)
optional_docs: Biosimilar trial documentation if brand-name Humira requested

22612.policy_reference: Cigna Coverage Policy 0140 - Lumbar Spine Surgery
required_docs: Conservative treatment: minimum 6 months physical therapy or chiropractic care documented
Epidural steroid injections: at least 2 rounds attempted and failed
MRI lumbar spine showing structural pathology (disc herniation, stenosis, spondylolisthesis)
Neurological deficit or severe radiculopathy documented
Orthopedic or neurosurgeon ordering NPI verified
Functional disability score (ODI or VAS pain score) documented
Conservative treatment: minimum 6 months documented (PT, chiro, pain management)
Epidural steroid injections attempted (minimum 2, documented failure)
MRI or CT myelogram showing foraminal stenosis or disc pathology at operative level
Neurological deficit documented (radiculopathy, myelopathy, or motor deficit)
Surgeon NPI verified (Orthopedic Surgery or Neurological Surgery taxonomy)
Functional disability assessment (ODI score >= 40 or equivalent)
